final_prompt.prompt:
Create an advertising image for a premium beauty product.

Style/medium: needs a "奢华精致" (luxurious and refined) aesthetic — references in the spirit of Tom Ford Beauty campaign photography, La Mer product editorial style, 1990s Japanese cosmetics advertising (資生堂/資生堂); exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: 
Subject: must include a serum bottle with glass body showing pale gold liquid
Scene/backdrop: must include soft pink gradient background with rose petals and water droplets splashing around the product
Lighting/mood: needs soft, natural light atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a soft pink gradient direction with pale gold accents — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a premium glass and liquid surface treatment — exact transparency and sheen is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
